2603.16430.title: EngGPT2: Sovereign, Efficient and Open Intelligence
2603.16430.paper_summary: EngGPT2-16B-A3B is the latest iteration of Engineering Group's Italian LLM and it's built to be a Sovereign, Efficient and Open model. EngGPT2 is trained on 2.5 trillion tokens - less than Qwen3's 36T or Llama3's 15T - and delivers performance on key benchmarks, including MMLU-Pro, GSM8K, IFEval and HumanEval, comparable to dense models in the 8B-16B range, while requiring one-fifth to half of the inference power, and between one-tenth to one-sixth of the training data and consequent needed training power. Designed as a trained-from-scratch Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) architecture, EngGPT2 features 16 billion parameters with 3 billion active per inference, with expert sizes positioned between those used in GPT-OSS and Qwen3. Approximately 25% of its training corpus consists of Italian-language data, to deliver strong capabilities for European and Italian NLP tasks among models of similar scale. This efficiency aims to position EngGPT2 as a key contributor to the growing portfolio of open-weight European models, combining performance and efficiency with full alignment to the EU AI Act. EngGPT2 is also a single model capable of multiple reasoning modes: non-reasoning, reasoning in Italian or English, and turbo-reasoning (a concise, bullet-point style reasoning available in both languages designed for real-time reasoning use cases). EngGPT2 aims to set a new standard for resource-conscious, high-performance LLMs tailored to European and Italian contexts.
2603.16430.paper_summary_zh: EngGPT2-16B-A3B 是工程組最新版本的意大利 LLM，旨在成為一個主權、高效且開放的模型。<lb/>EngGPT2 的訓練基於 2.5 兆個標記——少於 Qwen3 的 36T 或 Llama3 的 15T——並在關鍵基準測試中提供與 8B-16B 範圍內的密集模型相當的性能，包括 MMLU-Pro、GSM8K、IFEval 和 HumanEval，同時只需五分之一到一半的推理功率，以及十分之一到六分之一的訓練數據和相應所需的訓練功率。<lb/>EngGPT2 設計為從零開始訓練的專家混合（MoE）架構，擁有 160 億個參數，每次推理有 30 億個活躍參數，專家規模介於 GPT-OSS 和 Qwen3 之間。<lb/>其訓練語料庫約 25% 由意大利語數據組成，以在類似規模的模型中提供強大的歐洲和意大利 NLP 任務能力。<lb/>這種高效性旨在使 EngGPT2 成為不斷增長的開放權重歐洲模型組合中的關鍵貢獻者，結合性能和效率，並完全符合歐盟人工智慧法案。<lb/>EngGPT2 也是一個能夠支持多種推理模式的單一模型：非推理、用意大利語或英語推理，以及快速推理（以簡潔的要點風格進行的推理，適用於兩種語言，設計用於實時推理用例）。<lb/>EngGPT2 旨在為針對歐洲和意大利背景的資源意識型高性能 LLM 設定新的標準。
2603.16430.author: G. Ciarfaglia et.al.
2603.16430.authors: G. Ciarfaglia, A. Rosanova, S. Cipolla, J. Bartoli, A. Di Domenico, C. Fioroni, A. Fontana, M. R. Scoleri, M. I. Mone, D. Franchi, M. C. Del Gaudio, F. Picariello, M. Gabusi, S. Bonura, V. Morreale, I. Bailo
